label: Psychic ritual -- summon fleshbeasts (player)
description: Player-castable ritual that summons fleshbeasts. The number summoned scales with ritual quality.

fleshbeastCombatPointsFromQualityCurve.label: Fleshbeast combat points from quality curve
fleshbeastCombatPointsFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the combat points spent summoning fleshbeasts.
